sections.paragraph:
χαλεπῶς adv. of χαλεπός; grievously (Hom.; Philo, Leg. ad Gai. 346) AcPl Ox 6, 17 (Aa I 241, 15).

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

AcPl Ox 6 AcPl Ox 6 = Acts of Paul, POxy 6—List 1

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1076
